style_safety_policy: Scholarly-historical testimonial mode combining documentary authority with experiential witness. Evidentiary apparatus (citations, endnotes, photo captions) structures the narrative rather than emotional engagement mechanics. Moral complexity without prescriptive judgment. Character proximity through intersecting biographical threads rather than individual character arcs. No obligation to replicate celebrity figure treatment, citation density, or academic formatting—those are proprietary extraction points, not craft principles.
pov_and_distance: Multi-register omniscient narration: scholarly documentary authority in evidentiary sections, experiential immediacy in testimonial passages, investigative first-person in authorial discovery framing. Epistemic distance calibrated per section function—encyclopedic distance for character listings, intimate distance for quoted testimony, analytical distance for contextual exposition. Third-person omniscient remains dominant frame but shifts register to accommodate evidentiary mode transitions.
sentence_rhythm: Alternating density patterns: citation-heavy declarative passages establishing scholarly credibility contrast with kinetic dialogue reconstruction providing narrative momentum. Short, punchy testimonial statements (often single-sentence witness accounts) juxtaposed against complex subordinate clause structures providing historical context. This rhythm creates a pulse: evidence → interpretation → testimony → analysis. Declarative momentum in scene passages; reflective periodicity in frame sections.
paragraphing: Discrete functional units mapped to content type: endnote-equivalent entries function as paragraphs in scholarly sections, creating dense evidentiary texture; block dialogue with attribution tags in scene passages; compact single-paragraph format for character entries enabling rapid scanning. Multi-sentence flowing paragraphs reserved for thematic development in preface and transition sections. Paragraph boundaries signal content-type transitions (scholarly ↔ narrative ↔ documentary).
dialogue_system: Layered attribution hierarchy: direct quotation from primary sources anchors historical claims and provides experiential authority; fictionalized exchanges require documentary source labels establishing evidentiary basis; front matter sections contain no dialogue. Dialogue serves as documented exchange evidence rather than character development vehicle. Attribution tags carry evidentiary weight—source identification is narrative information, not footnote appendix.
description_strategy: Sensory specificity deployed sparingly and exclusively within testimony passages for experiential immediacy. Atmospheric detail subordinated to evidentiary purpose elsewhere—no descriptive digressions unconnected to documented claims. Character descriptions distill to single distinguishing trait per entry for mnemonic efficiency. Physical space description anchors location-convergence narrative device. No free indirect description; all sensory detail attributed to documented source or documentary frame.
exposition_strategy: Inline citations serve dual function: attribution and worldbuilding simultaneously. No separate information-dump passages; historical context embedded within evidentiary flow. Thesis emerges through direct assertion qualified by literary epigraph rather than argumentative development. Scholarly apparatus (endnotes, bibliography, photo captions) functions as narrative structure rather than supplementary documentation. Worldbuilding occurs at citation boundaries.
emotional_temperature: Scholarly detachment balanced against testimonial immediacy—the reader experiences emotional impact through quoted witness accounts, not authorial sentiment. Moral complexity acknowledged without prescriptive judgment; interpretive openness maintained through evidentiary gaps and documentary ambiguity. No manipulative emotional appeals; reader draws moral conclusions from accumulated evidence. Emotional register: gravity without melodrama, complexity without confusion.
hooking_and_transitions: Chapter titles establish thematic framing; opening quotes plunge reader into specific documented exchanges creating immediate evidentiary engagement. Personal discovery narrative and rhetorical questions generate intrigue in authorial frame sections. Thematic parallels (investigation mirroring investigation) provide connective tissue between sections. Physical location shifts handled through returning resident motifs or chronological progression. Location-convergence device provides retrospective closure structure.
adaptation_guidelines: For historical documentary narrative: anchor scope to single geographic microcosm; interweave documented figures with historical events for accessibility; use intersecting biographical threads converging on location as closure mechanism; deploy scholarly apparatus (citations, endnotes, bibliography) as primary narrative structure; juxtapose testimonial immediacy against documentary authority. For testimonial-driven fiction: quote firsthand accounts for experiential weight; use sensory specificity only in witness passages; subordinate atmospheric detail to evidentiary purpose. For scholarly apparatus fiction: thematic organization provides closure structure while maintaining openness; bibliographic trail functions as credibility mechanism.
taboo_copy_signals: Do not replicate: proprietary citation formats and bibliographic entry structures; copyrighted image credits and archival identifiers; literary epigraph attribution patterns; character entry format verbatim; hotel name and specific geographic locations; all historical figure names including celebrity and political personages; specific WWII events, dates, and chapter ranges; Vichy government figures and policies; quote length and citation density thresholds from fictional reconstructions; endnote cross-referencing system structure; photo caption format with Getty identifiers.
